Our Datasets

Open datasets published by AgIL for the research community. Download and use freely under the specified license terms.

Dataset Domain Format Size License Download
Vietnamese Sentiment Corpus Sentence-level sentiment annotations for education reviews NLP / Sentiment CSV ~15 MB CC BY 4.0 Coming Soon
Landslide Risk Geospatial Data Geospatial features for landslide risk prediction Geoscience / ML GeoJSON + CSV ~50 MB MIT Coming Soon
📋 Note for maintainers: When datasets are ready to publish, replace the "Coming Soon" button with an active download link class agil-btn-primary. For automated listing, consider extending YAML metadata.
